title: Adverbs of Degree
description: Words like QUITE, FAIRLY, RATHER, TOTALLY, and ABSOLUTELY fine-tune the intensity of adjectives.
summary_pt_br: Advérbios de intensidade: de slightly a absolutely. ABSOLUTELY com adjetivos fortes (exhausted), VERY com comuns (tired).

scenes.subtitle_en: Words like QUITE, FAIRLY, RATHER, TOTALLY, and ABSOLUTELY fine-tune the intensity of adjectives.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Advérbios de intensidade: de slightly a absolutely. ABSOLUTELY com adjetivos fortes (exhausted), VERY com comuns (tired).

scenes.text_en: Words like QUITE, FAIRLY, RATHER, TOTALLY, and ABSOLUTELY fine-tune the intensity of adjectives. Today's focus: adverbs of degree. The soup is quite spicy but not too much.
scenes.text_pt: Advérbios de intensidade: de slightly a absolutely. ABSOLUTELY com adjetivos fortes (exhausted), VERY com comuns (tired). Foco de hoje: adverbs of degree. A sopa tá bem picante mas não exagera.

scenes.title: Adverbs of Degree
scenes.body_en: Weak → strong: slightly, a bit, somewhat, quite, fairly, rather, very, extremely, totally, absolutely. Use ABSOLUTELY with strong adjectives (absolutely exhausted) and VERY with normal ones (very tired).
scenes.body_pt: Advérbios de intensidade: de slightly a absolutely. ABSOLUTELY com adjetivos fortes (exhausted), VERY com comuns (tired).

examples.en: The soup is quite spicy but not too much.
examples.pt: A sopa tá bem picante mas não exagera.

examples.en: I am absolutely exhausted after today's shift.
examples.pt: Tô completamente exausto depois do turno.

examples.en: Her response was rather surprising, actually.
examples.pt: A resposta dela foi bem surpreendente.

exercise.question: Complete: "The soup is ___ spicy but not too much."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The soup is quite spicy but not too much."
exercise.hint_pt_br: A sopa tá bem picante mas não exagera.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I am absolutely exhausted after today's shift.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "I am absolutely exhausted after today's shift."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Tô completamente exausto depois do turno.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Adverbs of Degree — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre adverbs of degree. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How was the new recipe tonight?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It was quite good, but slightly too salty.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: One said the sauce was absolutely perfect.
turns.pt_hint: Disse que o molho tá perfeito.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What about the dessert? Was it sweet enough?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It was rather rich for most people.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Should we adjust anything for tomorrow?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Reduce salt slightly and bake a bit longer.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Are you tired after all this testing?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am absolutely exhausted but extremely proud.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Rest well. Tomorrow we refine again.

scenes.title: Taste testing at Tropical Bites
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe how each dish was rated. Use at least three different adverbs of degree.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Every Tuesday, Rafa held a small taste-testing session with his team and a few loyal customers.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: This new sauce is quite spicy, but the balance feels slightly off.

paragraphs.speaker: Customer
paragraphs.en: Actually, I think it's absolutely delicious as it is. Don't change a thing.

paragraphs.speaker: Assistant
paragraphs.en: The dessert was rather heavy for a summer menu, in my opinion.

paragraphs.speaker: Rafa
paragraphs.en: Fair enough. We'll reduce the sugar slightly and test it again next week.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Cooking, like language, lives in the difference between slightly and absolutely.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Adverbs of Degree". Words like QUITE, FAIRLY, RATHER, TOTALLY, and ABSOLUTELY fine-tune the intensity of adjectives. The soup is quite spicy but not too much. I am absolutely exhausted after today's shift. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Adverbs of Degree". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Adverbs of Degree".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
